title: Autumnal & Winterly
description: A cozy Autumn and Winter mod with new cooking mechanics, Blocks and Decorational Features.
body:
Autumnal Winterly 

Embrace the cozy spirit of autumn and winter with Autumnal & Winterly! This mod adds a variety of seasonal content to enhance your Survival experience.

! THIS MOD NEEDS REACH ENTITY ATTRIBUTES TO WORK !
[https://github.com/JamiesWhiteShirt/reach-entity-attributes](https://maven.jamieswhiteshirt.com/libs-release/com/jamieswhiteshirt/reach-entity-attributes/2.4.0/reach-entity-attributes-2.4.0.jar)
To Import the Reach API, simply open your Modpack folder and put the API Jar File in.

NOTE: PLEASE USE THE CORRECT VERSION! THERE ARE TWO SEPERATE VERSIONS FOR SINGLE AND MULTIPLAYER!

Features:

🍁 Seasonal Cooking:
Create delicious new foods at a brand-new Cooking Station, perfect for warming up on chilly days.
(Mulled Wine, Peppermint Tea, Chocolate, Marshmallows and more!)

🌲 New Trees & Blocks:
Explore and build with Fir Wood, Porcelain Blocks, Kaolin Blocks (just to name a few).

⚒️ Decorational Blocks:
Craft new themed Decorational Blocks for example Ribbons, Fairy Lights and so much more to spice up your Home!

✨ New Materials, Ores & Plants:
Mine Platinum Ore, Craft Porcelain Sheets, Plant Winterberries search for wild Cinnamon Plants to Cook & Craft new Things!

❄️ Upgrades to existing Biomes:
Like Fir Trees in Snowy areas, Alpine Edelweiss on Mountains or even Peppermint Plants in swamps an Taiga Biomes.


JEI and REI Compact is Planned, but for now you need to look on the mod Page to see the Recipes for the Cooking Station:



🍰 Alpine Cake:
2× Sugar, 1× Egg, 1× Alpine Edelweiss, 1× Cinnamon Dough

🥧 Cinnamon Dough:
1× Sugar, 1× Apple, 1× Cup, 1× Cinnamon

🍽️ Breaded Veal Cutlet with Potatoes:
1× Potato, 1× Bowl, 1× Porkchop

🍫 Chocolate Bar:
2× Sugar, 1× Milk Bucket / Milk Flask, 2× Cocoa Beans

🎆 Chocolate Creeper:
2× Chocolate Bar, 1× Gunpowder

🥮 Cinnamon Dough:
1× Sugar, 1× Egg, 1× Wheat, 1× Cinnamon

🍪 Cinnamon Raven:
1× Sugar, 1× Milk Bucket / Milk Flask, 1× Cinnamon Dough

🐟 Cod with Carrots:
1× Carrot, 1× Bowl, 1× Cod

🌲 Fir Cookie:
1× Sugar, 1× Pinecone Oil, 1× Cinnamon Dough

🍨 Glowberry Ice Cream:
1× Cinnamon Dough, 1× Snowball, 1× Glowberries

☕ Hot Chocolate:
1× Cup, 1× Milk Bucket / Milk Flask, 2× Chocolate Bar, 1× Sugar

🌋 Magma Cream Cone:
1× Cinnamon Dough, 1× Magma Cream

🍯 Marshmallow Jar:
3× Sugar, 1× Jar, 1× Egg, 1× Pinecone Oil

🍵 Peppermint Tea:
1× Cup, 3× Dried Peppermint Leaves, 1× Pinecone Oil

🍓 Sweetberry Jam Jar:
2× Sugar, 1× Jar, 3× Sweet Berries

🍦 Winterberry Ice Cream:
1× Cinnamon Dough, 1× Snowball, 1× Winterberry

🍯 Winterberry Jam Jar:
2× Sugar, 1× Jar, 3× Winterberries

🍷 Mulled Wine:
1× Cup, 2× Winterberries, 1× Sugar, 1× Cinnamon

Additional Information:

The Mod will retrieve Updates, but they will take a while.
The Mod is a Server + Client Mod.
To Import the Reach API, simply open your Modpack folder and put the API Jar File in.
